demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult child present and providing care tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help my dad — he's been sick to his stomach and losing weight for months, but tonight he's thrown up dark gritty stuff that looks like old blood a couple of times, and now he's so weak and dizzy he can't sit up without the room spinning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The vomiting and the weakness came on suddenly this evening and he's gone downhill fast — he can't stand up now.

symptom_narrative.onset: the stomach trouble has been building for about 6 months; the dark vomiting and the sudden weakness started this evening
symptom_narrative.duration: months of stomach problems; a few hours of vomiting and dizziness tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a constant deep dull ache in the upper belly that antacids don't touch; feeling full after just a few mouthfuls; then tonight two big vomits of dark, gritty, coffee-ground-looking material
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says he feels completely drained and the dizziness is so bad he can't stay upright
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper stomach area; now dizzy and weak all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the stomach symptoms are constant and have slowly worsened over months; the vomiting and weakness came on fast tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — the antacids and his daily stomach tablet have done nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting or standing up makes the dizziness much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fresh red blood that they noticed, no chest pain; just the dark vomit, exhaustion and dizziness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no episode like tonight before, but the stomach discomfort and poor appetite have been going on for months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound tonight and completely dependent on his child to move; frightened to stand in case he faints

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing indigestion / stomach trouble and poor appetite for about 6 months
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter antacids and a daily stomach acid tablet, neither of which has helped

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: significant unintentional weight loss over the last few months — his clothes are hanging off him

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older adult living at home; adult child is present tonight and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: he's thrown up about two large amounts of dark, gritty, coffee-ground-looking material this evening — there's roughly a bucket with a few hundred millilitres of it by the bed
he looks very pale and washed out and is sweaty and clammy
he says he feels intensely dizzy and like he'll pass out whenever he tries to sit or stand
he thinks he's lost around 12 kg over the last few months without trying
buckets positioned by the bed; he is lying down and unable to get up
